metadata.name: Business / Commercial Tree
metadata.purpose: External TreeView data source for seller-side business type classification, value creation, offers, revenue sequences, operations, jobs/orders, and commercial transaction records.
metadata.schema_backbone: Flat node_id / parent_id records compatible with taxonomy_seed_v0_1 and comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2
source_notes: Built from prompts/prompt_1_business_commercial_tree.md in the Other Sector TreeView Build Prep Package.
Used reference/comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2.json only as schema and pattern reference, not as taxonomy to copy.
No legacy Business / Commercial taxonomy files were included in the uploaded package, so the taxonomy is a generated v0.1 sector seed based on the prompt requirements.

The tree preserves the seller-side viewpoint: business type, offer, customer, revenue model, channel, operation, supply chain, production/delivery, assets, workforce, quality, compliance/risk, and transaction records.

Offers / Listings, Quotes / Bids, Jobs / Work Orders, Invoices / Payments, and Records are represented through reusable object_folder_templates rather than duplicated as visible children below every class.
Models, Evidence, and VRQs are not visible default TreeView children; they belong to the Model activity tool, record attachments/evidence, and the event/message stream.
metadata.relationship_to_consumer_tree: The Human / Consumer tree is the schema/reference pattern. This Business / Commercial tree uses seller-side vocabulary and should not be treated as a renamed consumer purchasing tree.

nodes.label: Business / Commercial
nodes.notes: Root sector node.

nodes.label: Records / Jobs / Orders / Transactions
nodes.notes: Commercial records that preserve seller-side transaction lifecycle and outcomes.

nodes.label: Lead Record
nodes.notes: Primary seller-side record class. Must preserve relational links back to source offers, bids, jobs, orders, invoices, and outcomes.

children.label: Sold
children.relationship_requirement: References accepted offer and/or accepted bid.

OFT_STANDARD_EXCHANGE_CLASS.notes: Reusable exchange template. Not physically duplicated as visible TreeView children.

OFT_BUSINESS_REFERENCE_CLASS.notes: Reference-only template for business model patterns and template paths.

DGT_BUSINESS_TYPE.label: Business Type / Industry Class
DGT_BUSINESS_TYPE.notes: Used for seller-side business types and industries.

DGT_BUSINESS_PRODUCT_OFFER.label: Business Product Offer
DGT_BUSINESS_PRODUCT_OFFER.notes: Used for physical product offers, configurable products, bundles, and listings.

DGT_BUSINESS_SERVICE_OFFER.label: Business Service Offer
DGT_BUSINESS_SERVICE_OFFER.notes: Used for standard services, custom jobs, support, maintenance, and field work.

DGT_BUSINESS_DIGITAL_OFFER.label: Business Digital / IP Offer
DGT_BUSINESS_DIGITAL_OFFER.notes: Used for software, subscriptions, licensing, data, API, and content offers.

DGT_CUSTOMER_SEGMENT.label: Business Customer Segment

fields.label: Need Or Job To Be Done

DGT_CUSTOMER_SEGMENT.notes: Used for ICPs, buyer groups, channels, and segment assumptions.

DGT_REVENUE_MODEL.label: Business Revenue Model
DGT_REVENUE_MODEL.notes: Used to compare seller-side revenue mechanisms.

DGT_SALES_MARKETING_CHANNEL.label: Sales / Marketing Channel
DGT_SALES_MARKETING_CHANNEL.notes: Used to compare channels that produce leads, bids, orders, and relationships.

DGT_OPERATION_PROCESS.label: Business Operation Process
DGT_OPERATION_PROCESS.notes: Used for operating steps from lead to support.

DGT_SUPPLY_PROCUREMENT.label: Supply Chain / Procurement Item
DGT_SUPPLY_PROCUREMENT.notes: Used for suppliers, procurement methods, and sourcing records.

DGT_PRODUCTION_DELIVERY.label: Production / Service Delivery Mode
DGT_PRODUCTION_DELIVERY.notes: Used for make/sell/deliver modes and service delivery outcomes.

DGT_ASSET_EQUIPMENT.label: Business Asset / Equipment
DGT_ASSET_EQUIPMENT.notes: Used for facilities, equipment, vehicles, software, and intangible business assets.

DGT_WORKFORCE_ROLE.label: Workforce Role
DGT_WORKFORCE_ROLE.notes: Used for business roles, capacity, and responsibility comparisons.

DGT_QUALITY_STANDARD.label: Quality / Standard / Inspection Item
DGT_QUALITY_STANDARD.notes: Used for quality systems, standards, inspection, corrective action, and certifications.

DGT_COMPLIANCE_RISK.label: Business Compliance / Risk Item
DGT_COMPLIANCE_RISK.notes: Used for legal, safety, regulatory, financial, and operating risks.

DGT_COMMERCIAL_RECORD.label: Commercial Record / Job / Order / Transaction
DGT_COMMERCIAL_RECORD.notes: Used for leads, quotes, bids, jobs, orders, invoices, payments, support, and outcomes.

DGT_BUSINESS_MODEL_REFERENCE.label: Business Model / Template Reference
DGT_BUSINESS_MODEL_REFERENCE.notes: Reference grid for business model patterns and templates; not duplicated under each class.

validation_report.notes: Validation checks are structural and schema-shape oriented; final taxonomy labels still need human review for sector fit and preferred wording.
